form.formComment: Having second run back today. Not raced for 37 days. Fresh up after four months finished third of 9 starters at Warwick on March 8 over 4200m, 2.75 len behind Mount Anglesby with 75.5kg at $4.50. Previously second-up came from midfield; finished fourth of 7 starters at Aintree on October 26 over 4000m, 4.5 len behind Marsiac with 71.5kg at $6. Suited here and is sure to go close.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break; having raced just once last preparation finished third of 8 runners at Doncaster on November 29 over 3300m, on slow going 19 len behind Storming George carrying 68.5kg at $9.50. First up last campaign finished second of 9 starters at Chepstow on April 21 over 3200m, 1.3 len behind Limerick Lass with 70kg at $8.50. Can pose a serious challenge.

form.formComment: Racing well. Resumes off a 30 day letup. Last run finished second of 8 runners at this track on March 15 over 4100m, 1.0 len behind The Dog Thief with 73kg at $1.90. Race before held ground to the line finished third of 11 runners at Ludlow on January 15 over 4200m, 15 len behind Mondoui'boy with 74.5kg at $8. Progressing well this campaign. Hard to knock and can atone for latest run.

Hard to knock and can atone for latest run.

form.formComment: Raced two times to date. At very big odds at debut, pulled up at Huntingdon on January 22 over 3200m. Second-up ran last at Uttoxeter on March 14 over 4000m, on slow going 68 len behind Dig Deep with 67.5kg at $101. Take on trust. Tested in this line-up.

formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-8). Raced two times to date. At very big odds at debut, pulled up at Huntingdon on January 22 over 3200m. Second-up ran last at Uttoxeter on March 14 over 4000m, on slow going 68 len behind Dig Deep with 67.5kg at $101. Take on trust. Tested in this line-up.

form.formComment: Resuming after a three months break. Finished off last campaign 5 of 10 runners at Wetherby January 22 over 3200m, slow track; 21 len behind Klycot with 71.5kg at $51. First ever start ran didn't finish the race at Doncaster November 28 over 3300m. Can feature in the finish.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(1). Resuming after a three months break. Finished off last campaign 5 of 10 runners at Wetherby January 22 over 3200m, slow track; 21 len behind Klycot with 71.5kg at $51. First ever start ran didn't finish the race at Doncaster November 28 over 3300m. Can feature in the finish.

form.formComment: Last run finished fifth in a small field at Huntingdon on March 18 over 3900m, 58 len behind Kittys Glance carrying 65.5kg at $201. Run before ran last at Doncaster on February 28 over 3300m, on slow going 53 len behind Friendly Glance carrying 67.5kg at $101. Hard to recommend on recent form.
